Top Spirit · AngelServ01 / 06
Where you are, and where it goes

Less work by hand, more time back

Today the reports are built by hand, and a lot of the know-how lives in people's heads.

  • Routine reports drafted for you, checked by your people
  • One agreed set of numbers in every meeting
  • A team that uses AI safely on real work
  • Clear facts for the ERP decision, when you are ready
The outcome02 / 06
The work, and why it's safe

We map the work and cut the double-work

AI drafts and your people approve. Nothing reaches a customer or the books unchecked.

  • See how orders, invoices, and stock really flow
  • Quick wins first: the depletion report and price lists
  • First tools: the AI chat your Microsoft plan already covers, nothing new without a business case
  • We work only in tools your IT has approved
The work03 / 06
AI training

Rules, practice, everyday use: about 90 days

Small groups practice on their own weekly work, and each person gets faster at one task.

  • Set the rules for what goes into AI tools, and what never does
  • Train the order desk, sales, finance, logistics, leadership
  • A champion and a backup in each department, so the skill is shared, not stuck with one person
  • The goal is to shrink the routine work, so people have more time for brands and customers
AI training rollout04 / 06
Reporting

From reports by hand to dashboards your team refreshes

One report rebuilt by hand each month costs a day each time: about 12 working days a year. We rebuild it once, prove the hours saved, then take the next.

  • One agreed definition per number, so meetings just decide
  • A leadership dashboard: sales, open orders, stock before Christmas
  • Power BI Desktop covers the pilot; wider sharing needs licenses, agreed with you first
  • Runs on your export files, so it survives the ERP change
Reporting rollout05 / 06
The first 90 days, and the next step

One working meeting, then a scoped pilot

We walk the plan together. You pick the first report and department, and we bring a dashboard preview and show it live.

  • You leave with the pilot scope and a written price
  • Success is real hours saved and reports your team actually uses
  • Be ready before your busiest weeks, the Christmas rush
  • Angel Software Solutions LLC · Keith Swoger CEO, Will Humphries CTO, Andrew Demczuk CRO
